top_tweets.text: New in Claude Design: it stays on brand with your design system across projects, lets you edit directly on the canvas, syncs with Claude Code, and connects to more of the tools you already use. https://t.co/MK8YvLP8zV
top_tweets.author: claudeai
top_tweets.name: Claude
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Design 新功能：可跨專案維持設計系統一致性、支援畫布直接編輯、與 Claude Code 同步，並整合更多第三方工具。

top_tweets.text:
This model is insane at design.

I asked GLM 5.2 (left) and Opus 4.8 (right) to build me a landing page and you can't even tell the difference.

GLM cost $0.06 while opus cost $0.49. More than 6x cheaper while being faster + more token efficient.

Another win for open source AI. https://t.co/FJCYROq9Lr
top_tweets.author: nutlope
top_tweets.name: Hassan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 對比測試顯示開源模型 GLM 5.2 與 Claude Opus 4.8 在生成 landing page 的品質相近，但成本便宜 6 倍以上且速度更快，凸顯開源 AI 在設計應用的競爭力。

top_tweets.text:
Claude Code and Claude Design now sync both ways.

Run /design-sync to pull your design system into your repo and build against your real components, or push what you've built back into Claude Design and keep editing on the canvas.
top_tweets.author: ClaudeDevs
top_tweets.name: ClaudeDevs
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Code 與 Claude Design 現已支援雙向同步，可將設計系統拉進程式碼庫對應真實元件開發，或反向將程式碼推回 Design 繼續在畫布編輯。

top_tweets.text:
FIRST LOOK @ UPCOMING EPIC GAMES STORE DESIGN

"In 2025, player spending on 3rd party PC games grew 57%, an all-time record of $400m - Our goal is better performance, improved discovery, deeper community features ... We're undertaking a complete rebuild of the Launcher & Backend" https://t.co/ZUap6aDtAg
top_tweets.author: HYPEX
top_tweets.name: HYPEX
top_tweets.summary_zh: Epic Games Store 將全面重建 Launcher 與後端架構，目標是提升效能、改善遊戲探索機制與社群功能；2025 年第三方 PC 遊戲消費已成長 57% 達 4 億美元。

top_tweets.text:
At the State of Unreal today, Tim says AAA is failing, spending 100's of millions and getting only 10's in return.

He gives his  theories:

- Games are social now. "creating a massive advantage for big games and big ecosystems, um, because game with a lot of players is much more https://t.co/gPkq4qmhAQ
top_tweets.author: Grummz
top_tweets.name: Grummz
top_tweets.summary_zh: Epic Tim Sweeney 在 State of Unreal 指出 AAA 遊戲投入數億美元卻只獲得數千萬回報，認為遊戲社交化讓大型生態系擁有巨大優勢，玩家數多的遊戲更具吸引力。

top_tweets.text: there should be a term for this "beige" phase of web design. https://t.co/AkYkaQLS8l
top_tweets.author: danliu
top_tweets.name: Dan Liu
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者認為當前網頁設計正處於一種「米色」同質化階段，建議應該為這個現象命名。討論中有人提出各種觀點回應這波設計趨勢。

top_tweets.text: JUST IN: SpaceXAI engineer endorses the idea of acquiring Figma & plugging the design platform directly into Cursor.
top_tweets.author: Polymarket
top_tweets.name: Polymarket
top_tweets.summary_zh: SpaceXAI 工程師公開支持收購 Figma 並將設計平台直接整合進 Cursor 的構想，引發社群熱烈討論。

top_tweets.text:
At HumanLayer, we’re on a mission to solve the AI slop code problem.

In 2025 we open-sourced our Research, Plan, Implement framework, now deployed inside fortune 500s like Block and Uber - places where shipping slop is just not an option

And that was just the beginning.

Today, https://t.co/mDSeSwjJ1Z
top_tweets.author: dexhorthy
top_tweets.name: dex
top_tweets.summary_zh: HumanLayer 推出 Research, Plan, Implement 框架解決 AI 生成程式碼品質問題，已在 Block 和 Uber 等財富 500 強企業內部署應用。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: StickerWords
top_products.author: Nora
top_products.tagline: Learn new words from the world around you
top_products.summary_zh: 透過拍攝周遭環境中的物體來學習新單字的語言學習工具，適合想在日常生活中累積詞彙的學習者。

top_products.title: BrainFlow
top_products.author: Tristan Manchester
top_products.tagline: Turn your rambling thoughts into coherent notes
top_products.summary_zh: 將零散的思緒和語音自動整理成結構化筆記的工具，幫助使用者快速記錄與組織想法。

top_products.title: SuperGoal
top_products.author: Felix Joy
top_products.tagline: World cup in your menu bar
top_products.summary_zh: 在 macOS 選單列顯示世界盃賽事資訊的小工具，讓球迷隨時追蹤比賽動態。

top_products.title: Wilson
top_products.author: Maria-Elena Tzanev
top_products.tagline: AI coworker in Slack that builds reports, work tools, + more
top_products.summary_zh: 整合在 Slack 中的 AI 助理，可自動建立報表、工作工具等，協助團隊提升工作效率。

top_products.title: Framer 3.0
top_products.author: Jurre Houtkamp
top_products.tagline: With Agents, Branching, Community, and an all-new design
top_products.summary_zh: 新版本加入 Agents、分支功能、社群模組及全新介面設計的網頁設計與開發平台。

top_products.title: Infinite
top_products.author: RTK
top_products.tagline: OS runtime unifying GA4, PostHog, + Stripe into a local db
top_products.summary_zh: 將 GA4、PostHog 和 Stripe 等服務的資料統一整合到本地資料庫的運行環境工具，方便開發者管理多源數據。
